failedAssertions.reason: @nivalis/utils exports only Effect-related utilities (8 exports: NotFoundError, ServiceError, UnauthorizedError, ValidationError, composeLayers, makeEffectServiceLayer, makeServiceLayer, makeRuntime). The assertion requires at least one general-purpose helper function (e.g., cn(), debounce, formatDate) but none exists. All 3 source files (errors.ts, layers.ts, runtime.ts) are Effect-specific.
